name: Enhanced Skill Creator
description:
Claude Skill 是模块化能力包，通过三级加载机制（元数据→指令→资源）高效扩展 Claude 功能。创建流程包含 7 步：理解需求、规划资源、初始化目录、编写 SKILL.md、添加资源、验证打包、迭代改进。核心要素包括：精准的 description 触发条件、精简的 SKILL.md（<5k tokens）、合理的资源组织（scripts/、references/、assets/）、具体使用示例。关键原则：使用祈使句而非第二人称、保持信息渐进式披露、脚本独立可执行、避免内容重复。遵循规范可创建专业、高效、易维护的 Skill。

Claude Skills are modular capability packages that extend Claude's functionality through a three-tier loading mechanism (metadata→instructions→resources). The 7-step creation process covers: understanding requirements, planning resources, initializing directory, writing SKILL.md, adding resources, validation & packaging, and iteration. Key elements include: precise description for triggering, concise SKILL.md (<5k tokens), organized resources (scripts/, references/, assets/), and concrete examples. Core principles: use imperative voice instead of second person, progressive information disclosure, independent executable scripts, and avoid content duplication. Following these guidelines enables creating professional, efficient, and maintainable Skills.
